title: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
meaning_summary: I Wanna Dance with Somebody stays valuable because it functions as both a euphoric party record and a permanent nostalgia hit across generations.
revenue_drivers: Decades-spanning playlist use keeps the song in constant circulation.
Its crossover familiarity supports strong event, retail, and social replay value.
Licensing and celebration-driven listening continue to refresh demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes large evergreen streaming, catalog playlist strength, and recurring sync-style reuse.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out catalog position
ownership.notes: This is a modeled artist-side estimate built from legacy pop hit behavior rather than disclosed contract data.
